content:
🌙 Overnight Task Queue - Wed 3/4

Ready to run at 11:30pm EST. Reply with numbers to approve:

2️⃣ Write About page (brand story + memoir)
3️⃣ Draft FAQ page
4️⃣ Research domain: keeplivingproject.com

6️⃣ Email template drafts
7️⃣ Blog post: The Story Behind KeepLiving
8️⃣ Update Trello cards

Reply with numbers like: 1, 3, 5

⏰ Auto-starts 11:30pm EST tonight
